nasb.text: So he served Baal and worshiped him and provoked the Lord God of Israel to anger, according to all that his father had done.

esv.text: He served Baal and worshiped him and provoked the Lord, the God of Israel, to anger in every way that his father had done.

cnv.text: 他事奉巴力，敬拜巴力，照著他父親所行的一切惹耶和華以色列的　神發怒。

ccb.text: 他像他父亲一样供奉、祭拜巴力，惹以色列的上帝耶和华发怒。
